description: Establish a deterministic, CPU-only environment using conda `vibe_test` with pip-managed dependencies and fixed Python/PyTorch seeds across data, dataloading, and training.
steps: Pin runtime to Python 3.10+ and avoid GPU-specific launchers
Set and persist `PYTHONHASHSEED`, `random.seed`, NumPy, and PyTorch deterministic flags
Use fixed default seeds in generation, train, and eval entrypoints
Document seed behavior in spec and run scripts

description: Create and persist pre-generated synthetic train/validation data from a known continuous function with controlled noise for learnable regression.
steps: Implement `scripts/generate_data.py` to synthesize features and labels
Persist tensors to `artifacts/data/train.pt` and `artifacts/data/val.pt`
Write metadata (seed, split sizes, coefficients, noise level) to JSON
Validate dataset shape and non-degeneracy at generation time

description: Implement a tiny MLP bounded by constraints (<=2 hidden layers, <=32 hidden units) suitable for small synthetic regression.
steps: Create `src/model.py` with input -> [dense, activation] -> output architecture
Enforce width <=32 and max 2 hidden layers through defaults/assertions
Initialize deterministically with fixed seed and torch manual seed
Expose a minimal API callable from train/eval scripts

description: Build deterministic 10-epoch CPU training with metric tracking, checkpointing, and epoch-by-epoch progress output.
steps: Implement `src/train.py` with DataLoader, optimizer, MSE loss, and fixed defaults
Log train/val loss per epoch to console and `artifacts/logs/train_progress.jsonl`
Save checkpoints (`last.pt`, `best.pt`) and optionally best-metric metadata
Guard against NaN/Inf losses and fail fast with explicit errors

description: Implement validation metric computation and deterministic reporting for smoke and full runs.
steps: Implement `src/eval.py` for deterministic validation pass
Write epoch-level summary to `artifacts/logs/eval_progress.jsonl`
Report final and best validation MSE in machine-readable form
Use fixed dataloader order with no shuffling in validation

description: Add deterministic smoke test plus run-time checks for reproducibility and file integrity.
steps: Add `checks/smoke_test.sh` requiring at least 2 epochs
Verify artifacts (`train`, `val`, logs, checkpoints, report) exist
Check non-empty progress logs and finite numeric losses
Ensure a clean second run with same seed produces stable metrics

description: Integrate explicit progress checkpoints and repository synchronization with each progress update.
steps: Maintain `session_progress.md` with task status and latest metrics
Append status objects to `.codex-research/run_registry.jsonl`
Run git sync against `https://github.com/CHDTevior/vibe_test.git` on checkpointed updates
Record sync attempts (success/failure) with timestamps

description: Provide runnable entry scripts for single-task and full-plan execution with deterministic ordering.
steps: Implement `run_one_task.sh` mapped to task IDs
Implement `run_plan.sh` executing ordered task list
Use fixed 10-epoch defaults in full run path
Emit structured failure messages without silent fallbacks
